calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL SERVICES OF AMERICA, LP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as to the tenth cause of action in plaintiff's complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed.
Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/RBU)
